vBRIEFInfo.description: README frames the Go installer as a no-Node bootstrap and omits the project-directory requirement for setup.

plan.title: docs: reframe Go installer across consumer docs (Node always required) + project-directory note

narratives.Description: The root README Getting Started section frames the frozen Go installer as a 'no-Node bootstrap' (lines 52-54, 93). That is misleading: Deft's live gates run through the TypeScript engine, so Node 20+ is always required to RUN the framework regardless of how files are deposited -- there is no Node-free runtime. The README also never states explicitly that project setup writes .deft/ and AGENTS.md into the current working directory, so a newcomer can run setup in the wrong folder.
narratives.Origin: Operator request during an interactive session reviewing the Wave-5 installer issue (#1912); follow-on from the #761 npm-canonical doc cutover.
narratives.Acceptance: README.md (1) reframes the legacy Go-installer section away from 'no-Node bootstrap' to a legacy/offline + layout-migration bridge, with an explicit 'install Node 20+ first' note for machines without Node; (2) adds a short 'where your project lands' note that setup writes .deft/ + AGENTS.md into the current working directory; (3) keeps the internal section anchor reference consistent after the heading rename. A CHANGELOG [Unreleased] entry is added. task check passes.
narratives.Overview: Documentation-only change. Started README-only, then extended (operator request) to reframe the same 'no-Node bootstrap' wording consistently across content/UPGRADING.md, content/QUICK-START.md, and the AGENTS.md managed-section template (content/templates/agents-entry.md, regenerated into AGENTS.md via run agents:refresh). Aligns all consumer-facing installer docs with the npm-canonical reality (#761) and the frozen-installer design (#1912 amendment 2026-06-24). The deeper UPGRADING.md reduction (deleting the per-version historical sections + retiring the stale 'canonical headless = deft-install --yes --upgrade' framing) stays a Wave-5 item on #1912, gated on the frozen installer existing.

items.title: Reframe the legacy Go-installer section: drop 'no-Node bootstrap', add 'install Node first' note
Add a 'where your project lands' note (setup writes into the current working directory)
Fix the internal section anchor reference after the heading rename

references.title: Issue #1912: build + freeze the last Go installer (legacy stage-1 bridge)
